subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Him Who is imprisoned unto him who hath believed in God and was numbered among the faithful in the Tablets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی الذی آمن بالله و کان من الموحدین فی الالواح
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @unity; oneness of humanity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
